package rulecoverage

func NegativeLargeCsvOrJsonExportWithoutBufio() string {
    ruleID := "large_csv_or_json_export_without_bufio"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Export data written in loops without visible buffering in handlers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
